title: AI Governance Practitioner
description: Build a governance operating model that aligns product teams, risk owners, and legal reviewers from day one.

title: Responsible AI Product Launch
description: Ship AI features with clear controls for fairness, transparency, and incident response before release.

title: Data Leadership Career Track
description: Move from senior individual contributor to strategic lead with decision frameworks and communication playbooks.

title: AI Risk Register Masterclass
description: Create and maintain practical risk registers that auditors and executive stakeholders can trust.

title: AI Controls for Engineering Managers
description: Turn policy into delivery-ready controls for prompts, model updates, and post-deployment monitoring.

title: UK & EU AI Regulations in Practice
description: Translate UK GDPR and EU AI Act requirements into concrete product and data decisions.

title: Model Evaluation Blueprint
description: Design repeatable evaluation pipelines for quality, safety, and governance confidence before scaling.

title: Stakeholder Communication for AI Teams
description: Present technical trade-offs and governance implications clearly to legal, compliance, and board stakeholders.

title: Senior AI Delivery Capstone
description: Combine governance, architecture, and execution into a portfolio project reviewed by senior practitioners.
